prompt:
Build v5 of the Watchtower board: FIX the Floor↔Lanes bridge by replacing the confusing per-card 'promote' with a CONVERGENCE flow (select a cluster of related concepts → produce ONE brief). The v4 'promote' button (one on every card, incl. done concepts + status-notes, writing a vague 'elaborate' ticket) is being REMOVED — it's noisy and it skips the cluster-synthesis that is the whole point. The board is experiments/watchtower-board/server.mjs (+ parse-concepts.mjs); Lanes view renders concepts from backlog/concepts.md. STEPS: (1) REMOVE the per-card 'promote ▶' button from the Lanes view AND remove the POST /api/promote endpoint. (2) ADD lightweight multi-SELECT to Lanes concept cards — a small checkbox or click-to-toggle 'selected' state with a clear visual highlight; NO button per card. (3) ADD a single sticky action bar at the bottom of the Lanes view that appears ONLY when >=2 cards are selected: 'Converge N concepts → brief ▶' (show the live count); hidden when <2 selected. (4) ADD endpoint POST /api/converge accepting {items:[{concept, lane}, ...]} → write ONE queue ticket to experiment's engine queue: experiments/watchtower-engine/queue/<queue_id>.json where queue_id = 'q-' + Date.now() (OS clock, never invented) + '-converge-' + a sanitized short slug ([a-z0-9-] only, no / or ..). Ticket shape: { queue_id, kind:'instruction', experiment_id:'exp-converge', requested_by:'watchtower-board', requested_at:<ISO from OS clock>, args:{ from:'lanes-converge', count:N }, prompt:'Converge these N related concepts into ONE cohesive brief. Decide the form (research brief | architecture decision | coding epic). Concepts:
1) <lane>: <concept>
2) ...
Identify the through-line, what they collectively imply, and the concrete next work; write the brief to docs/watchtower/converged-briefs/<slug>.md.' }. Return {accepted:true, queue_id}. (5) On success: clear the selection and show a transient 'converged N concepts → <queue_id>' message. (6) HARD CONSTRAINTS: additive to the Lanes view only; do NOT change the Floor view, /api/state, /api/concepts, or the staleness logic; remove ONLY the promote button + /api/promote; pure Node + vanilla JS, no deps; all timestamps from the OS clock. (7) TEST without disturbing the running :7430 server: factor the converge-ticket-builder into a PURE function and a node self-check that asserts a well-formed ticket from sample items (write to a temp dir); 'node --check' both files; do NOT start/kill any server. (8) Write proof to experiments/watchtower-engine/proof/board-v5-converge.md (max 6 lines: what was removed, the select+converge UX, the /api/converge ticket shape, how tested, confirmation Floor/Lanes-render/state/concepts/staleness untouched). Then complete the run-next-workflow bookkeeping.
